popularStory.headline: My Maternal 25th. Great Scottish Grandfather, Gilbert de Fraser I
popularStory.description:
Name: Gilbert de Fraser I
Born: 1098 in Tweeddale, Peebles-shire, Scotland
Marriage: before 1118 in Scotland to Margaret de Alpin, of Lochaber
Children: (6)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Fraser於1098年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯時，他的父親Simon de Fraser28歲，母親Margaret Alpin of Lochabar31歲。他與Margaret Alpin結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1164年在英國蘇格蘭享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Fraser于1098年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯时，他的父亲Simon de Fraser28岁，母亲Margaret Alpin of Lochabar31岁。他与Margaret Alpin结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1164年在英国苏格兰享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Fraser was born in 1098, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Fraser, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, was 31. He married Margaret Alpin. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1164, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Fraser est né en 1098, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Fraser, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Alpin. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1164, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Fraser 1098 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Fraser 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Alpin of Lochabar 31. Er hat Margaret Alpin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1164 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Fraser è nato il nel 1098 nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Fraser, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Alpin. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1164, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fraserが1098年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスで生まれた時，父Simon de Fraserは28歳，母Margaret Alpin of Lochabarは31歳であった。Margaret Alpinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1164年にイギリススコットランドで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fraser(이)가 1098년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Fraser(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alpin of Lochabar(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Margaret Alpin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1164년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Fraser nasceu em 1098, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Fraser, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Alpin. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1164, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Fraser родился в 1098 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Fraser было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Alpin. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1164 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Fraser nació en 1098, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Fraser, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Alpin of Lochabar, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Alpin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1164, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
